Amongst the remnants of the crashed gravship, a still-intact gravjumper engine hums with energy.

It is possible to repair the substructure, but various components of the gravship are beyond saving. The engine pushes against gravity, levitating the ship and allowing long-distance travel. By travelling, you may unlock the technology that will give you an opportunity to rebuild these systems and more.

Launch a gravship by scaling it down, fixing damaged substructure and replacing damaged thrusters and astrofuel tanks. Refine more astrofuel in the biofuel refinery and select a gravtech research project to progress as you travel and stress the grav engine.

The Vanilla Furniture Expanded: Power mod has been updated with a very important update regarding the Helixien Gas Network.

The original code was made by me (Sarg Bjornson) and it was quite sloppy, causing a lot of bugs and inconsistent behaviour. Thanks to the amazing Fluffy, the whole gas network code has been rewritten, and it should work perfectly now.

NOTE: since most of the classes controlling the Gas Network have changed, you should re-make any gas network components you have on an existing save. You can replace buildings without cost by accessing dev mode and turning on God mode. Then simply deconstruct your current gas network (with all gas-based objects), and replace it, for free.

Safety is a number that gets deducted from the Failed outcome chance. For example, safety 5 reduces the risk of the failed outcome by 5% (from 10% to 5%). This value can also be negative, increasing the risk of a failed experiment.

Stability is a number that gets deducted from the swap chance. For example, stability 5 means that the base chance of the genes swapping turns from 10% to 5% (becoming more stable). This value can also be negative, which will mean the chance of genomes swapping their positions and resulting in an unwanted hybrid are larger.

Time multiplier accelerates or increases the time taken by the genomorpher to complete its task. A fractional modifier accelerates the process (for example 0.5 means it will take half the usual time), while a modifier larger than 1 slows it down (2 means it will take double the time).

Some escaped genetically modified monstrosities have been wandering aimlessly through the wilds, and have been attracted to your colony! They are attacking immediately!\n\nThey seem to be afflicted with Greater Scaria, so they won't be able to be tamed, and will die in a few days, even if treated.

The effect of hundreds of years of genetic experimentation running amok. Hordes of ravenous, maddened genetic aberrations are a threat to anyone in this planet.

An asteroid shower has crossed into your gravship’s sector. Countless fragments of vacstone streak across the void, some slamming into the hull with explosive force. Most will burn away or miss, but not all.
A massive comet is passing nearby, its brilliant tail lighting up the void around your gravship. The spectacle inspires awe among the crew, raising their spirits until it will fade from view.

A dense cosmic dust cloud has drifted across your sector, shrouding your gravship in particulate haze. Visibility is almost zero, and targeting systems are struggling to lock onto anything. The dust will eventually clear as the cloud drifts away.

A powerful gravity distortion has enveloped your gravship, preventing any kind of launch until it subsides. The anomaly will remain for the next few days before naturally fading away. Until then, all gravship launch rituals are unavailable and the ship will be unable to move from this location.\n\nWhile the anomaly persists, your systems will passively collect gravdata, but only if an active gravship research project is selected.
A micrometeor storm is pelting the area with tiny, high-velocity debris. Exposed structures and people are slowly damaged by the constant bombardment.\n\nThe storm is expected to last about a day.
A drifting cloud of ancient wreckage has crossed our flight path. Pieces of metal and scrap hurtle past the ship. Some will miss, others might not.\n\nThe debris will pass us by in about 12 hours.

A solar flare has begun.

While this solar flare will not disable electronic devices, it will quickly heat all exposed surfaces, potentially causing heatstroke and fires.

It should pass in about a day.

A drifting cloud of highly toxic cosmic dust has enveloped your gravship. Microscopic particulates are seeping into every exposed space, corroding surfaces and poisoning the crew. The dust cloud will persist only briefly, but its effects are immediate and dangerous.
An unusual drought has set in.\n\nDrought is devastating for plant life and will quickly destroy all the crops not planted in the hydroponics. Be sure to quickly harvest any plants you can.

Global temperatures have suddenly risen to dangerous levels.

Flora and Fauna is suffering from these changes as biomes shift into their warmer counterparts. Resources become scarce, forcing factions into conflict.

It will last anywhere between a season to several years.
A freak, small scale hail storm is ravaging the local area. Any person or creature not hiding under the roof risks getting injured by ice pellets.

Atmospheric composition of the planet drastically changed resulting in a significant drop in temperature.

Flora and Fauna is suffering from these changes as biomes shift into their colder counterparts. Resources become scarce, forcing factions into conflict.

It will last anywhere between a season to several years.

A space entity of unimaginable size has covered a local star, resulting in a long lasting eclipse.

Terrified of this supernatural phenomenon, other factions will use this time to wage war and conflict across the surface.

It will last anywhere between a season to several years.

A strong psychic pulse emitted by a long forgotten entity changed the very genetical structure of local flora. Whilst the sky filled with a seemingly endless auroras, colourful flowers started sprouting everywhere. 

All pawns will gain a positive mood buff for the time of the event. The rapidly spreading flowers will overgrow everything, including your fields. 

It will last anywhere between a few days to a season.

A dangerous psychic entity caused disturbance on subatomic levels, resonating across all particles of the atmosphere.

A seemingly endless supernatural rain has begun, altering the very composition of time. Any person or creature not under the roof will age significantly faster.

It will last anywhere between a season to several years.
A space battle is raging in the sky, may last up to 1 day.
All fauna in this area is much larger than usual.
Unusually nutrient-rich rainfall is sweeping across the region, boosting plant growth for its duration.
An intense geomagnetic event blankets the region, completely disabling all electrical devices.
All fauna in this area is much smaller than usual.
Winds are almost completely absent in this area.
Winds are extraordinarily stronger in this area.
Acrid vapors seep from the ground, blanketing the area in a foul smell that burns the lungs and sours the mood.
A serene atmospheric phenomenon encourages colonists to spend more time gazing at the sky. Increases the chance of skygazing and boosts the joy it provides.
In this extremely flat coastal plain the tides push far inland, regularly submerging large stretches of land.
A Staticlord is creating a hurricane.
A freak localized storm is blasting a small area with repeated lightning strikes.
A Chronopath is pausing a raid.

A caste of dryad which specializes in producing a unique shaggy, leather-like material. Together with its Gauranlen tree, this dryad can be sheared for a soft, beautiful, insulative material on an ongoing basis. However, it is slow and ineffective at work or combat.

A curious dryad caste specialized in ambrosia production. Together with its Gauranlen tree, this dryad can generate invigorating ambrosia on an ongoing basis. However, it is completely defenseless and requires careful attention against threats.
A dryad caste specialized in territorialism and can launch ranged acid projectiles. Though it can dish out tremendous damage, it is vulnerable in melee due to its oversized mouth.
An extremely easy-going caste of dryad which specializes in finding stone chunks. Absorbs minerals from the ground that help harden its carapace while leaving excessively large pieces aside.
A splash of acid that continues to cause burn wounds for quite some time after the initial attack.
Shrouded in a veil of controlled invisibility.
This creature feeds on sunlight. Inadequate levels of light will kill it.
A permanent burn scar that cannot be treated.

Toxins in the bloodstream. This can come from various sources, including environmental toxins, venomous bites, or poisoned weapons.

At high doses, toxic buildup is lethal. Even at low doses, it can generate cancers.

Contrary to base game toxic buildup, creatures who die with this toxic damage can be eaten.
Dangerously low core body temperature. Unless re-warmed, hypothermic slowdown gets worse and ends in death. Recovery is quick once the victim is re-warmed.
Gravship maintenance and construction speeds are boosted thanks to this person using the engineering command ability.
This person's gravship maintenance and construction speeds are boosted thanks to being near someone who is using the engineering command ability.
This animal has a reduced pain sensitivity, and it takes longer to be downed due to pain.

When an awakened dryad reaches 2 years of age, they start getting affected by separation sickness. This sickness is progressive and always lethal. It is caused by the dryad losing its connection to the Gauranlen tree, and not being able to restore it due to being unshackled.\n\nSeparation sickness can be slowed down by medicine, but eventually every Awakened dryad dies.
This angora rabbit has bonded with a colonist. It will provide a psychic connection to that colonist increasing psychic entropy recovery rate, but the rabbit will die if the bonded colonist dies.
Psychic connection with an angora rabbit that helps with neural heat dissipation.
Psychically-induced invisibility. This actually affects others nearby, making their brains unable to perceive the sight of this individual, even if the eyes are unaffected.
The royal peacock nuzzled me. I can feel a psychic energy flowing through my body.
A long-term scar tissue damage to the airways in the lungs. It doesn’t require tending.

Toxflu is a highly contagious and rapidly striking disease, characterized by fever, cough, fatigue, and difficulty breathing. It spreads quickly through contact with infected bodily fluids. Those who contract Toxflu can experience severe respiratory distress and, in severe cases, death. It goes away nearly as quickly as it appears, however anyone who interacted socially with a person suffering from toxflu has a chance of catching it.
Hemophilia is the inability for blood to clot properly, causing wounds to bleed much more profusely.
Pronounced mental or physical unrest causes insomnia, insomnia means one can often feel sluggish or exhausted and find themselves hardly ever capable of sleep.
Higher red blood-cell count means hyper-coagulation occurs, causing wounds to bleed much less profusely.
Whether by sour mood or mental issues, rebelling means any forced work is met with snide comments and eyerolls, and taken less than seriously.
Severe loss of focus resulting in a greatly decreased work speed, caused by distractable trait.
Extreme mental focus on the tasks at hand, greatly increasing the productivity.

A sacrificial mental state which will end upon successful arrest or death.

Long-term presence of caffeine has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug.\n\nWithout regular doses of caffeine, withdrawal symptoms will begin. Soy sauce can be added directly to food, and is used as a dip or salt flavor in cooking, as well as providing a rich umami taste. Soy sauce contains 10 times the antioxidants of red wine, and can help prevent cardiovascular diseases (increases blood pumping and filtration).

A paste made from ground wasabi rhizomes and used as a pungent condiment for sushi and other foods. It is similar in taste to hot mustard rather than chili peppers in that it stimulates the nose more than the tongue. Wasabi clears your breathing and makes you feel warmer for a while.

A condition that makes an animal unable to walk by interfering with the motor cortex. If not treated in time, Abasia inevitably interferes with functioning of organs - for example by halting the heart functions. A creature with Animal Abasia can be tended to which will slow down the disease, but cannot be cured.\n\nAny hybrid or paragon animal will get this disease 3 years after being hatched or born naturally, though this is affected by the hybrids's quality.
This creature was genetically modified with a controller booster.

A disease originating from a bacterial infection that attacks lungs. Animals with tuberculosis will keep spitting blood until blood loss causes them to die. Every time a coughing attack occurs, the lungs of that animal will get more and more damaged. A creature with Animal Tuberculosis can be tended to which will slow down the disease, but cannot be cured.\n\nAny hybrid or paragon animal will get this disease 3 years after being hatched or born naturally, though this is affected by the hybrids's quality.
An improvement over the bionic Power Claw, these claws have been vat-grown with a mixture of human and bear DNA, and replace the subject's hand with versatile, non-retractable claws.
A prosthetic animal leg strengthened with bear muscles, and ending in a powerful bear claw that adds a powerful melee attack.
An implant that uses bear genes to improve function of the liver. Specially useful for those alcoholic chickens.
Grafts of bear muscle tissue on the subject's torso increase overall strength and stamina. These grafts however tend to stimulate the production of an abundance of body hair.
This creature has been victim of a frenzied attack.
An implant that uses chemfuel to pump blood through the animal's body. This implant is intended for creatures whose heart is failing catastrophically, since it is less efficient than a natural heart.
These skin nodules can be integrated in a human's torso, causing a huge explosion if the subjects dies violently.
An implant that uses boomalope genes to improve function of the stomach.
This huge leporid ear gives amazing enhanced hearing. Also, super kawaii!
Burrows underground to be able to move while being almost impervious to attacks. This ability needs to be recharged to be used again.
An eye implant that uses genetic splicing with canid genes to give an old (or damaged) eye decent vision. This implant is not meant to replace healthy eyes.
This hybrid humanoid / feline eye provides improved night vision, at the expense of a certain short-sightedness outside and during the day. Ideal for nyctophile colonists.
Cat reflexes greatly increases the speed and melee dodge chance of the hybrid for a while, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
A tail implant that uses genetic splicing with feline genes to substitute a broken or missing tail. This implant is not meant to replace a healthy tail.
Releases an insanity cloud that reduces sanity of anyone passing through it, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
recently invoked the insanity of That Which Man Is Not Meant to Know
Releases a poison cloud that harms anyone passing through it, except reptilians, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
A reinforced bionic heart that acts like a miniature 4-stroke internal combustion engine powered by chemfuel to pump blood through the body.
A reinforced bionic stomach that uses a combination of gastric acid and chemfuel to efficiently digest food.
An implant that uses chicken brain tissue to patch damaged neurological pathways. This implant is intended for brain-dead creatures.
An implant that uses chicken genes to improve function of the kidney. Birds have large kidneys. Yep, you learned that today.
A bionic heart implant using a reinforced shell of insectoid chitin for protection. This is a heart designed to take a beating. Pun intended, but it's the last one, I promise.

This hybrid humanoid / insectoid eye provides improved vision in a wide range of different wavelengths, including those usually outside the human range, completely modifying the way the subject perceives his surroundings.
A bionic implant adding a sturdy crocodile spine to the creature's skeletal system.
A set of improved teeth designed to rapidly chew and ingest any kind of food. Leaves kind of a mess, though...
Grotesque but powerful hand blades that have been modified to be used in mining operations, increasing both speed and yield.
This body part has been terribly warped by being exposed to a dangerous spatial distortion. Warping is very painful, and warped body parts are often lost.

A disease which causes affected creatures to enter berserk rages. A creature with greater scaria can't be cured and kills its host about five days after infection. Their seething rage will allow them to survive without having to eat or rest until their inevitable death.
Genetically altered hairballs are suffocating this creature. This negatively affects breathing and can even cause unconsciousness.
A biochip that modifies the brain to reduce the need for sleep.
This creature will die quickly if set on fire.
A genetically modified thrumbo horn that can be implanted in a subject's forehead. Nasty.
This is a hidden hediff that modifies the hybrid's hunger depending on quality.

A synthetic skin substitute that is much thicker and a much better insulator than human skin. This provides a measure of defense but, more importantly, makes the subject more resistant to high temperatures.
Releases insect clouds that damage anyone crossing through them, except insectoids, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
A bionic implant which gives the creature compound insectile eyes. Compared with simple eyes, compound eyes possess a very large view angle, and can detect fast movement.
A bionic implant adding insect mandibles to the creature's face. Insect mandibles improve manipulation and eating, while also working as an offensive weapon

These hybrid humanoid / insectoid feeling appendages can be implanted in a subject's head, completely modifying the way the subject "sees" and feels the surrounding world. The experience may be slightly overwhelming due to sensorial overload.
An implant that uses genetic splicing with insectoid genes to give the ability to detect pheromones, thus improving the olfactory system. Can't be installed on birds and (ironically) insects.
Keen senses greatly increases sight and conciousness of the hybrid for a while, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
This is a bioelectronic kidney prosthesis that greatly improves the efficiency of the subject's kidney by using insectoid tissue, providing resistence to toxic substances.
A bionic animal leg reinforced with tough lizard skin.
This creature has very little need for sleep, and can stay awake for a long time.
A bionic heart strengthened by the action of active mechanites.

A bionic implant adding a plasteel structure with active mechanites to the creature's skeletal system.
An advanced animal tail, even more powerful than a natural one.
This hybrid is very agile and receives a considerable bonus to melee dodge.

A bionic implant adding thrumbo jaws to the creature's mouth. These creatures devour trees, so you can imagine their jaws are up to the task.
A bionic animal leg reinforced with muscle tissue from a powerful elephant.
A synthetic skin substitute that is much thicker and a much better insulator than human skin. This provides a lot of defense and makes the subject more resistant to extremes of temperature.

Toxins in the bloodstream. This can come from various sources, including environmental toxins, venomous bites, or poisoned weapons.

At high doses, toxic buildup is lethal. Even at low doses, it can generate cancers.

This hybrid implant substitutes the subject's jaw with a set of venomous fangs. Useful in combat, but not very comfortable.
Vents exhaust fumes on the 8 adjacent tiles, burning anyone unlucky enough to be in melee, and then it needs to be recharged to be used again.
This creature has very little need for sleep, and can stay awake for a long time.
An implant that uses genetic splicing with wolf genes to give an old (or damaged) jaw decent functioning. This implant is not meant to replace healthy jaws.
The subject's legs can be modified by weaving hybrid human/wolf muscle fibers within the base tissue, giving her a significant strength and speed boost.
Blinding venom in the bloodstream. This venom is not lethal, but it will last for a while before it stops affecting sight.

Toxins in the bloodstream. This can come from various sources, including environmental toxins, venomous bites, or poisoned weapons.

Like clockwork, the lives of our fellow believers are ever intertwined. What causes one of us suffering causes all of us suffering and what brings us higher brings all of us higher. Together, we are one and we are strong.
Use educational application, play educational games, watch (or listen) to educational videos. Requires a powered computer with a chair.
List guests in the area and manage hospitality.
Humanity has been practicing genetic engineering for centuries, and the correct way to use it as a tool is by carefully following a strict scientific method and proper experiment security.
There must be no limits to genetic engineering. The exhilaration of creating new life, of bending the genetic code until it does what it was designed for, that's what makes science worth pursuing.
Trust is a resource in low supply, everyone our people meet is an enemy.
Serene and therapeutic, placid lakes and lapping shores are criminally underappreciated. With a little time or simple engineering rivers and oceans alike can leave our bellies full of tasty fish.
Kings and Queens are the true path to prosperity, the mind of the common man is unfit for leadership.
A careful examination of the stars will unlock mystical powers far beyond our wildest imagination.
Our leader should be a talented melee fighter and brutal warrior, only usurped by one greater. Bloodshed, corpses, scars are a part of life and a show of strength on this planet.
A warrior's code of honor means striking down oneâ€™s foes unto death itself. Should oneâ€™s spirit falter and cowardice prevail, forgiveness can only be found in the afterlife.
Our home should feature all the accommodations of a great city, homes, workshops, and places of leisure should all be present and accessible by all.
One should aspire to feel the ache in their fingers after a long day of craft. A talented blacksmith or tailor is to be dignified.
Reading and passing one's knowledge on is a most scholarly mission, and should be most enthused over.
Bigotry is absolutely to never be tolerated, helping those in need and respecting their beliefs are rewards in and of themselves.
Age and wisdom often come in tandem, our wise and elderly should be respected on that premise alone and should not be expected to toil.
Itâ€™s not enough to simply not participate in slavery, we should actively work to fight against those who dare to enslave others and free those who have suffered such inhumanities.
Our leader must also be our prophet, and itâ€™s important that we heed their advice.
Holy flame breathes life into this planet and many others like it, may it guide us to salvation and may it reduce our enemies to ash.
Technology should be shunned, unless it serves the flesh. Only through extreme biological experimentation may we unlock our hidden potential.
There shouldn't even be such a thing as individualism. By acting in perfect synchrony, our society will be more than the sum of its parts.
Our leader must be worshipped as a living God, a physical manifestation of our ideals and precepts.
Work gives a man dignity. Only through hard work and being productive can a person really grow.
The wellbeing of our bodies and minds is something our people take very seriously. Itâ€™s important that we look out for each other and tend to the wounds of our friends and family alike.
To be touched by pestilence is a boon to be coveted. As diseases spread, so too shall our influence.
The labyrinthine tunnels of the underdark ungulate with a seemingly limitless hive of relentless and brutal insects, we should not fear them, we should revere them.
Darkness obscures oneâ€™s vision as well as oneâ€™s mind, darklight is a wicked occurrence and is not to be condoned.
Never tire, never wither, never need for sustenance. Mechanoids are humanity perfected and should be revered as our superiors.
Insubordination and dissent should be quenched to make space for a strong sense of nationalistic pride.
Stagnation is death and as with all things in this world, homes are only temporary. Traveling this world and walking roads unwalked always leads to greater things.

While defending oneself is acceptable, we have come too far and evolved too much to ever endorse the premise of warfare or slavery. Even tantrums should only manifest in forms that do not harm others or property.
Let us toast to the acts of dance, drink and debauchery. Any free time is a good time, but party time is the best time.
Machines, factories, drones, a goal to any successful community should be optimizing these devices and shunning the idea of sentient beings performing tasks normally meant for them.

Mastering the power of the mind is essential to securing oneâ€™s place in the universe. Strength of mind can be achieved only through inner peace, and inner peace can only be achieved through meditation.
Power must be balanced between a select few, lest any settlement or empire fall to inevitable corruption.
We embody the essence of royalty, ensuring our titles and their inherent authority are passed down through generations, forever respected and entwined with our bloodline.
Nothing should ever be wasted, not even bloodied or torn clothes. Discarded remains of old civilizations should be kept as treasures and reminders.

The theory that any gods or all-powerful force watches or guides us down to trivialities is either asinine or incomprehensible by mere man, and equally so is the idea that all came from nothing. It is better to ignore such dogma and respect the freedom of those who find respite in such beliefs.
Plurality only brings a false illusion of choice, and breeds discontent, rebellion and chaos. With an iron fist we will govern our people and bring prosperity to all.

Man's time on this earth is brief and fleeting, to deny oneself of any of life's pleasures such as lust or gluttony is the one true sin. Throw wide the gates to tireless festivity, live and breathe endless splendor.

There are ancient entities in this Universe that are more powerful than mere gods. Immensely powerful and utterly indifferent to us humans who can barely begin to comprehend them. Only by worshipping them can we hope to placate their ire.
No Gods or Kings should be worshipped, only man and his unslakable desire for wealth. Colonies should be managed like companies.

It is forbidden to question the crown of a king or queen, even the soil itself is undeserving to feel the touch of our leaders' divine feet. Our leader should want for nothing and through their grand design we will prosper.
To be cursed to walk this earth is true torture, and whether by means of cataclysm, famine, or pestilence the departure of ones soul from their mortal coil should be celebrated.
The forces that guide this world are not for the faint of heart nor weak of will. Only through forbidden texts, dark pacts and proper initiation can one truly see beyond the veil.
All creeds and beliefs have both truths and fabrications, a healthy mind will listen carefully and with scrutiny to what tenets say as well as what they choose not to say.
The Universe is God. There is no God but the combined substance, forces, and laws that are manifested in the existing universe.

Putting oneâ€™s faith in rituals, prayer or powers beyond only delays oneâ€™s personal growth. Enlightenment, happiness, and purpose can all be found from within and through any matter one feels is right.
The true face of gods is found in the bite of a spider, the sting of the scorpion. Let those of many legs crawl all over us.
This ideoligion is a descendant of ancient Shinto and Taoism. It may have very different precepts than those of thousands of years ago, but its symbols are similar.

Decadent, velvety, rich--When these words grace our ears, first thoughts are of bars of sweet, sweet chocolate. Tangy yogurts, flaky pastries, and moist cakes arenâ€™t just welcomed--Theyâ€™re indisputably deserved.

 - Colony receives 15 Chocolate to start
 - Makes colonists immune to VCE's diabetes
With wealth comes power, going too long without profit means going too long without securing oneâ€™s position of power.
Eating meat is barbaric and uncouth, better eaten are the fruits of hard labor and ever-giving soil.
Infidels can choose to adopt our beliefs, or die.

Power represents the state of a machine's internal battery. If it gets too low, the machine will stop performing tasks and return to its station to recharge.

Fulfillment represents how happy someone is with their personal achievements in life. If they achieve their dreams and complete their lifetime goals, the fulfillment will increase. Each stage of fulfillment decreases mental break threshold. Achieving maximum fulfillment will result in a final growth moment.

Represents the assortment of different foods in a colonist's diet, reflecting their ability to access and consume a wide range of nutrients and flavors, calculated as an average of the variety in meals and the variety in ingredients in those meals.\n\nLow values will cause a mood penalty, while higher values will cause a mood bonus.

Sanity represents how detached someone is from their humanity due to being exposed to unexplainable void phenomena. Low sanity will eventually lead to madness, which may end up with inhumanization. Low sanity will also twist any social interaction the person is in, potentially spreading their madness among others.
Because of a caffeine addiction, this person needs to regularly consume caffeine to avoid withdrawal symptoms.
Because of a tobacco dependence, this person needs to regularly consume the drug to avoid withdrawal symptoms.
Because of a developed Featherdust dependence, this person needs to regularly consume the drug to avoid withdrawal symptoms.
Because of an active mechanites addiction, this person needs to regularly consume mechanoid eggs, produced by mecha-chickens, to avoid withdrawal symptoms.

Anonymity reflects on how secretive a person finds their identity and personality to be. A pawn with this belief will feel happier when it’s high and unhappy when it’s nearing depletion. Anonymity slowly rises over time and any social interaction or exposed facial features will lower it.

Corruption reflects a person's desire to give in to the dark, eldritch, and possibly even violent desires deeply embedded within them; a mildly corrupt pawn cannot lose ideological certainty. Corruption slowly fades daily, but can be paused by nearby obelisks and increased by incantation rituals. Upon reaching 100 corruption a pawn will immediately begin mentally breaking, and upon reaching 0 a pawn will easily be swayed to any other ideoligion
Dessert need represents the desire to engorge yourself with lusciously sinful confectionery creations.

Travel to a remote destination using your gravship. Every crewmember aboard contributes greatly to launch success, making a full crew highly valuable. However, smaller thrusters provide no benefit to the launch. You’ll also gather gravdata during the journey to advance research. At the end, you can choose to keep the old map open or abandon it.

Travel to a remote destination using your gravjumper. The pilot’s skill is the most important factor for a successful launch, with the co-pilot also providing a strong boost. Additional crew can help, but only to a small degree compared to a standard gravship. At the end, you can choose to keep the old map open or abandon it.

A special ideoligious status focused on maintaining and improving gravship systems to the exclusion of all else. This specialized role grants increased construction and repair efficiency, and the ability to coordinate nearby crew to improve maintenance operations across the ship. Holders of this role dedicate themselves entirely to the shipâ€™s well-being.

A special ideoligious status focused on the study of stellar phenomena and long-range navigation. Navigators guide the gravship through orbit and deep space, interpreting gravitational currents and charting safe passage between worlds. Their understanding of the cosmos greatly improves the shipâ€™s research efficiency and travel safety.

A special ideoligious status devoted to the art of flight and control of gravship engines. Piloting specialists are trained to maneuver the vessel through planetary orbits and emergency situations, keeping the crew alive when systems fail. They can save the gravship and the crew from peril.
To create automated defences is a waste of time and good material, which could be better spent raising far deadlier animals.
Genetic experimentation is risky, and we must accept that failures are an unavoidable part of the process.
If a genetic experiment fails catastrophically, it is our duty to get rid of the unwanted results as soon as possible.
We are destined to greatness. Failure is not an option, and any unwanted results of our experimentations should be gotten rid of as soon as possible.
Humanoid experimentation is just another tool at our disposal.
Humanoid experimentation is despicable, an absolutely unforgivable sin. We will not tolerate having such monstrosities running around the colony.
Being coerced or otherwise manipulated into following a different belief is a despicable act. If somebody seeks knowledge of another's faith, then let them ask for it naturally.
We should never allow ourselves to be recruited by another faction.
It is wrong to accept any outsiders into our ranks.
Spirits, booze, sauce, whatever you call it, we desire it. At least an occasional drink should be encouraged and we shouldnâ€™t even think of sobriety.
Drinking is just plain fun, though not in excess.
Alcohol is okay when consumed in small dosages, but it is better to stay away from it as long as possible.

Histrionic tendencies are despicable, through true anonymity we can achieve things thought unfathomable. For the betterment of yourself and your brothers in faith, keep your voice to a whisper and your face covered.
We feel bound by authority alone to follow our current ideology, and will not think twice if an opportunity presents itself to change our ways.
Auroras are a beautiful respite from the absolute darkness.
The blinding lights in the heavens give us a nasty headache.

Advanced machines and automated factories are to be shunned, for they detract from the exquisiteness of artisanal work.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Electric work table speed: -50%.
 - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Mechanoids factories speed: -25%.

From the woodwork of a simple bow to grand factoriums, a craftmaster knows how to craft with efficiency.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Electric work table speed: +50%.
 - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Mechanoids factories speed: +25%.
Automated defenses are a good way to defend our colony.
Automated defenses are key to a proper defense of what is ours.
Flesh only should be replaced by flesh, to replace a body with a machine is forbidden.
There is nothing that would make us happier than acquiring exquisite tomes of knowledge for our colony.
Itâ€™s important to soak up every bit of information we can, how else are we supposed to learn? Most books are even quite entertaining to boot.
Reading is just such a chore. We retain nothing from it.
Reading is not something that can be rushed. It is important to spend a lot of time on each page, absorbing all the little details.
Books are an open window to a world filled with wonders. We love reading and will quickly devour any text we come across.
Why write down what can be taught much quicker semantically or through trial and error? What an absolute waste of time.
Passing on one's knowledge is a purely respectful act. The authors of this world and their heirs shall be the ones to inherit it and all of itâ€™s fruits.
Writing is a chore, something that wastes time and requires a huge effort.
Writing comes naturally to us, and we do it fast and efficiently.

It is by the hand of an omniscient and all-powerful ancient god that we are threatened. Let us partake in an ever-obscuring, ritualistic way of life, that it may shield us from such baneful judgements.
A craftmaster must never rush, lest the quality of the product suffer.
Darklight is an unnatural and cheap imitation of the miracle that is light, and should be avoided.
Beyond being difficult to fight in, bloodshed should never take place in darkness, lest the enemy be spared peering into your eyes before you end their lives.
Death is inevitable, an incredibly sad fact of life.
Death is inevitable, but we prefer not to dwell on it and not be reminded of its reality as much as possible.
We'd rather not do cleaning and hauling tasks, as they are incredibly exhausting, but they are necessary.
An aching body is to be revered. Nearly nothing is found more rewarding than a day of hard work.
Dumb tasks are necessary. That's all there is to it.
Hard work is good for your body and for your mind.
Eclipses are scary, a preternatural darkness bloating the light of the sun.
What is this, a retirement home? Get out of my way, fossil!
True wisdom comes only with age, and those who have seen many seasons are to be venerated.
To quash a sacred flame is to commit an unspeakable sin.
There is nothing more exhilarating than extinguishing a dangerous fire.
Fish are animals, and as such fishing should be a banned activity.
A brave and ruthless military tactician who specializes in leading by means of fear and threats. Capable of executing insubordinate pawns in order to motivate the rest.

A keeper of sacred flame whose primary job is to control pyres, bonfires, and kilns. A veritable anatomical expert capable of excising organs from recently deceased cadavers. Because of organ damage and decay only between one and three organs will be harvested at random and the rest of the corpse will be reduced to meat.

A dedicated medical professional able to tend to wounds with surgical precision. Possesses the unique ability to hyperfocus on their doctoring patients in times of mass trauma, temporarily suppressing their needs for rest, recreation, or hunger.

A most jovial hooligan incapable of understanding that not all times can be party time. A party leader is able to throw an amazing party at any time. However, they will find themselves needing about twice the recreation time as the normal person to be happy on a day-to-day basis.
To be infected is to be blessed, and to go long without blessing is regrettable.

An insectoid hymn. The ritual will refresh the cooldown of the insectoid herder's "Construct a Nest" ability. If the ritual gets the best possible result it will make any insectoids currently assaulting the colony flee. Except the Black HIve, those want your blood.

Royalty demands swift action; thus, the cooldown of permits is lessened, allowing for a more rapid response to the ever-changing whims of noble desire.

The honored have the privilege of calling upon their allies more frequently, their requests for aid met with a nod and a half a cost, easing the burden of leadership.
Craving to be one of the powerful elite is a very understandable desire and should not be looked down upon.

By inducing trance on oneself and reaching erudition you cast away the shackles of the physical and find the ability to manipulate the world just as trivial as breathing.
We worked hard for what we have, we cannot take from the weak as we too were once weak. Doing so is a tremendous shame.
We display our strength and perseverance through conquest, and in doing so we bring honor to our colony.

Keeping animals captive to consume their flesh and their resources is deeply immoral and should be avoided at all costs. Growing our own fruits and vegetables is a much nobler pursuit.

Fun and games arenâ€™t optional - Enjoy every moment of recreation and make it the best you can for yourself and your friends.

 - Colonists gain recreation at 50% the speed when using any Joy buildings.

Recreation is an important part of life.
Titles and crowns, relics of a bygone era, draw ire more than admiration. Those who flaunt their noble status find themselves at the receiving end of equal disdain.

Those who drape themselves in the vestments of royalty ascend beyond mere mortals. Each step up the ladder of nobility brings greater veneration from the common folk, from a respectful nod for a Yeoman to awestruck reverence for a High Stellarch.

Royal titles are chains that bind freedom, and each title is a shackle more cursed than the last. From Yeoman to High Stellarch, the disdain grows with the weight of the crown, heavy is the head that wears it.

Every crown and every title is a symbol of burdens shouldered for the good of all. Regardless of the rank, a title earns a uniform respect, an acknowledgment of the wearer's elevated place in our order.
A body marked with scars is disgusting.

Skilled labour should be approached with care and time. Rushing things only leads to sloppy results and unfortunate accidents.
Pursuits of skilled labor are meticulous and time-consuming, it is better to focus our attention and efforts elsewhere.

Cast off your shackles, and should you find us suitable, be welcomed within our community as kin and kith alike. Should you find your new home ill-suited for your needs, we wish you a warm, albeit melancholy goodbye.

Participating in slave trade is an absolutely vile idea. The only reason to purchase a slave is with intent to immediately free them. Moreso, those who struggled through enslavement deserve our compassion and respect.

Only buying slaves is justifiable, after which we should provide them amicable amounts of lodging and consideration within our colony. By selling a slave one leaves their fate up to the good faith of their buyer, a very unwise decision.
Chatter between those of our creed is forbidden. We seek to achieve a greater understanding through a venere of silence and secrecy, an oath few outsiders can comprehend.

Desserts and treats shouldnâ€™t be withheld, sugary confections should be eaten at least every couple days.

Nobility flows through blood, as titles pass from the fallen to their kin. A parent's demise elevates the firstborn, inheriting the mantle of leadership.
Our colony, like it or not, is a business. Going too long without a sale is stressful, but making a hefty profit is veritably euphoric.
Everything has a price, and it just so happens our kind are particularly persuasive when it comes to proving that to others.

To shed blood or break bone is barbaric and disgusting.

Canning is a method of preserving food in which the food contents are processed and sealed in an airtight container (jars like Mason jars, and steel and tin cans). Canning provides a shelf life of several years. A freeze-dried canned product, such as canned dried lentils, could last as long as 30 years in an edible state. This research gives access to the canning machine.

Cheesemaking (or caseiculture) is the craft of making cheese. The production of cheese, like many other food preservation processes, allows the nutritional and economic value of milk to be preserved in concentrated form. Cheesemaking allows the production of the cheese with diverse flavors and consistencies. This research gives access to the cheese press.

A condiment is a spice, sauce, or preparation that is added to food, either after or during cooking, to impart a specific flavor, to enhance the flavor, or to complement the dish. All condiments are created at the condiment prep table.

Deep frying (also referred to as deep fat frying) is a cooking method in which food is submerged in hot fat, most commonly oil, as opposed to the shallow oil used in conventional frying done in a frying pan. This research gives access to the deep fryer.

Grilling is a form of cooking that involves dry heat applied to the surface of food, commonly from above, below or from the side. Grilling usually involves a significant amount of direct, radiant heat, and tends to be used for cooking meat and vegetables quickly. This research gives access to the grill.

Soup is a primarily liquid food, generally served warm or hot, that is made by combining ingredients of meat or vegetables with stock, or water. Hot soups are additionally characterized by boiling solid ingredients in liquids in a pot until the flavors are extracted. This research also gives access to the electric pot necessary to cook soups.

Haute cuisine is the pinnacle of culinary artistry, emphasizing meticulous preparation, refined techniques, and exquisite presentation. It transforms the finest ingredients into visually stunning and harmoniously balanced dishes, elevating dining to an experience of sophistication. This research also unlocks the haute section, a specialized workstation for crafting these masterful creations.
Stew is a form of a very nourishing meal, cooked in bulk over fire. This research also gives access to the wood-fired pot necessary to cook stews.

Soybean fermentation is the process by which soybeans are submitted to a chemical breakdown by bacteria, yeasts, or other microorganisms, transforming into new products. This research gives access to the soy sauce fermenter.
